conventions.name: doc-folders-have-index-and-agents
conventions.description: Every folder in the docs/ knowledge tree is an index folder and must contain a README.md category index plus an AGENTS.md with folder-scoped standards. Placeholders match single, extension-less path segments, so only directories are selected and the README.md/AGENTS.md files themselves are skipped. Folder depths are enumerated explicitly because the '**' glob does not reliably match directories in konsistent.
